title: フライト準備は難航中？

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun showed me something remarkable at the tryout race
the other day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wander the academy grounds, hoping to meet the spirited racer one
more time.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hurry up, Yukipe! Don't you wanna watch Gold City race with your
own eyes? Let's get moving!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
H-hold up, Maya! On second thought, I'm not sure if I wanna go... I've
never been 'round so many people...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: C'moooon, you'll be fiiine! I'll be with you the whole time!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hey, wait. I think I've seen you before...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right! You're that trainer I met at tryouts! Wow, funny seeing you
again! Why are you here?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Huh? Me? Waaait, this is like...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Such a grown-up situation! Squee! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Buuut I'm kinda in a hurry right now, so... as much as I wanna talk,
y'know...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Wait, I have an idea! Why don't you come with us? That'd be perfect!
Right, Yukipe?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Huh? U-uhhh... Maya? What're you—

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: You're coming with us! It's time for takeoff!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Whaaa?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before either Yukino Bijin or I can interject, Mayano Top Gun grabs
the two of us by our wrists and drags us along with her.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The runners are now approaching the fourth and final corner! Gold
City makes a beautiful turn from the track's outer side! And right
behind her is Tamamo Cross!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I'll show ya what true grit looks like!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: You're not going anywhere!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Ohhh! Wooow! City's really someth'n else!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I know, right?! City and Tamamo are both sooo cool! It's like they're
twinkling!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ohhh... So you can go zoooom there? I never would've thought that!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Watching grown-up Umamusume race is always suuuper exciting!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun's eyes are twinkling with joy, and her gaze is glued
to the top Umamusume from start to finish.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Finiiish! Tamamo Cross takes first place! A close second, Gold City
follows right behind her!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff... Yeah! Victory's mine!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Dang it, I messed up the timing on my sprint...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
It's fine. This won't happen again. Mark my words, Tamamo. I'm going
to win next time.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh. Sounds like a challenge if I've ever heard one! I'll take ya
up on dat any time, any day, City!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Wow! That race was amaz'n! Tamamo and City were both so cool!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: So she shouldn't have gone bam there... It was too early! And City figured that out... She really is amazing!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ughhh, watching twinkly grown-ups race makes my heart keep going all badump, badump... I wanna be twinkly too!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Yep! There's always something new to learn from these big races! So
watching them makes my heart go badump!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
All those racers are so much more experienced and grown up! And
grown-ups are twinkly!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
So like, I wanna be like that too! I wanna be all twinkly and running in
races that make people go badump!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Awww, maaan. I wanna run in the Twinkle Series toooo!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
M-me too! G1 might be a ways away, but I'll get there one day! I
hafta!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: All right! Let's get ourselves back to the academy and start train'n!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Blegh, training?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I don't wanna! I'm not gonna! Training sucks!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna explore the racetrack! See ya!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Wait, Maya! Geez, she's already gone...
choice_data_list: Is she not very good at training?
Is she not very good at training?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
No way! There's noth'n Maya can't do! Once she puts her mind to
someth'n, you can't stop her. She's amaz'n like that.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Like when she got used to runn'n on the dirt tracks real quick! And
I've never seen her even break a sweat dur'n our dance lessons!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
She's even good at study'n! Anyway, if she says "I got it," then she's
really got it!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Uh-huh, Maya says it heaps of times. For everyth'n, actually! She gets
it all! It's amazing, really...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to Yukino Bijin, I feel like I have a slightly better
understanding of Mayano Top Gun and her abilities.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She has a prodigious ability to "get it"...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That is, her astounding intuition that always leads her down the right
path. She's a bona fide genius!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
But for some reason, she has no interest whatsoev'r in training... Ever
since our first session, she hasn't shown up at all...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... And 'cause of that, she isn't allowed to run in any races—not
even scrimm'ges!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I get that races are where you're s'pposed to show the fruits of your
training, but... I dunno... I still feel sorry for Maya. The poor thing...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't stop thinking about Mayano Top Gun. She wants to race more
than anything, yet...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Is there anything I can do for her?
